arts.ttl: Alan Shearer shares bold Arsenal team news theory amid Mikel Arteta injury crisis
arts.sum: Premier League legend Alan Shearer is confident Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta will turn to one man in particular to lead the line against West Ham United this weekend amid the club's injury crisis. Ahead of Arsenal's return to action in the Premier League on Saturday, Shearer told Betfair that he would predict that Merino will be starting as the centre-forward against the Irons.
